sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36067" key="e)/nskios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔνσκῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σκιά</etym>) <sense id="n36067.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tarnished,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> </bibl>Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.53B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.53B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
